_comment: v2: for firmware with the two-path (broad/narrow) trigger rework. TRIG_MIN_AREA is now a density (sum(v-threshold)/nAvail MHz), not a raw sum, so it is NOT comparable to tuningdefaults.json's v1 scale — devices on older firmware must keep using tuningdefaults.json. The module will automatically update to these settings on first flash, or if the date increases thereafter.
